comment.body: Sometimes I just don’t get people. We’re here on the Substack of one of the most respected quant analysts..for literally pennies. This is the woman who was attacked for like a a year by jealous haters, shrugged off every bit of it, predicted every market trend with incredible accuracy, and is admired by institutional players, data providers, and more. People begged her for a year to start a Substack and teach them, and now here we are, getting insight into her thinking, and while she’s made it clear that she focuses mainly on SPX and VIX, and the most important question people can come up with is her opinion on some random stock or ponzi crap. Unbelievable.

comment.body:
Alma said that the market can’t be negatively surprised.
It’s interesting, though, this duality..on one hand, the market’s getting more complacent and leaning more towards calls, but on the other hand, it’s heavily hedging the March window with VIX calls.
If I follow Alma’s logic, that points to a spot up/vol up scenario for March.
